category_sources: source_facts.description says kubernetes-cli is the Kubernetes command-line interface; official Kubernetes docs state the command-line tool is named kubectl.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables contains kubectl; official Kubernetes documentation identifies the CLI tool as kubectl.
docs_sources: Official Kubernetes documentation has kubectl overview, generated command reference, and tool installation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify kubectl as the Kubernetes CLI; official docs describe kubectl as communicating with the Kubernetes control plane via the Kubernetes API.
